title: Demistify: a large-eddy simulation (LES) and single-column model (SCM) intercomparison of radiation fog
justification: An intercomparison between 10 single-column (SCM) and 5 large-eddy simulation (LES) models is presented for a radiation fog case study... Seven of the SCMs represent single-column equivalents of operational numerical weather prediction (NWP) models...

title: Causes of WRF surface energy fluxes biases in a stratocumulus region
justification: The paper investigates 'Causes of WRF surface energy fluxes biases in a stratocumulus region'. Given the cited paper context 'Performance of an eddy diffusivity-mass flux scheme for shallow cumulus boundary layers' and the numerous EDMF-related citations, it's highly probable the WRF model used incorporates EDMF, and the study analyzes its outputs.

title: Updates and evaluation of NOAA's online-coupled air quality model version 7 (AQMv7) within the Unified Forecast System
justification: The UFS air quality model incorporates the US Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) Community Multiscale Air Quality (CMAQ) model as its main chemistry component. ... The current AQM version 7 (AQMv7) is coupled with an earlier version of CMAQ (version 5.2.1). Here we describe the development of the updated AQMv7 by coupling to a “state-of-the-science” CMAQ version 5.4. ... A simulation was conducted for the period of June–August 2023 to assess the effects of these updates on the forecast performance of ozone (O3) and fine particulate matter (PM2.5), two major air pollutants over the continental United States (CONUS).

title: The Year of Polar Prediction site Model Intercomparison Project (YOPPsiteMIP) phase 1: project overview and Arctic winter forecast evaluation
justification: The paper evaluates forecast performance of multiple models, including those that likely use EDMF (e.g., ECMWF-IFS), by using merged model data files (MMDFs).

title: The Cloud_cci simulator v1.0 for the Cloud_cci climate data record and its application to a global and a regional climate model
justification: The paper applies the Cloud_cci simulator to the EC-Earth global climate model and the Regional Atmospheric Climate Model (RACMO), which use an EDMF scheme for mixing and cloud processes.

title: The implementation of NEMS GFS Aerosol Component (NGAC) Version 2.0 for global multispecies forecasting at NOAA/NCEP – Part 1: Model descriptions
justification: The planetary boundary layer (PBL) scheme is updated to the hybrid eddy-diffusivity mass-flux (EDMF) scheme (Han et al., 2016).
